title: Island Likes & Ratings
description: Let players like and rate each other's islands. Drive friendly competition and showcase the best builds.
body:
# ⭐ Island Likes & Ratings

Add a social layer to your BentoBox server. Players can like other players' islands, and the most-liked islands rise to the top. Simple, social, and it gives builders an audience.

## Features

- **Like system** — visit an island and give it a like
- **Top liked islands** — leaderboard of the most popular islands
- **Dislike option** — optional, can be disabled
- **Configurable cooldowns** — prevent spam-liking
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon.
